notifications.title: Inbox
notifications.subtitle: Applications, rewards, and activity updates
notifications.emptyHint: When you apply to become a partner or unlock rewards, updates appear here.

partner_application_received.title: Application received
partner_application_received.body: Thank you for applying with {{business_name}}. We're reviewing your application and will get back to you soon.

partner_application_approved.title: Application approved
partner_application_approved.body: Welcome to CO:FE(X) Partner! Set up your café profile and launch your first EEFFOC campaign.

partner_application_rejected.title: Application update
partner_application_rejected.body: We couldn't approve your application for {{business_name}} at this time. You can update your details on your profile or contact us with questions.

crawl_complete.title: Crawl complete!
crawl_complete.body: You finished {{crawl_title}} — reward points are in your wallet.

gift_received.title: Coffee gift received
gift_received.body: Someone sent you a drink credit. Redeem at any partner café.

beans_earned.title: Beans earned
beans_earned.body: You earned {{beans}} Beans from your streak milestone.

spawn_nearby.title: Rare spawn nearby
spawn_nearby.body: A limited-time bonus is active at {{shop_name}}.

auth.name: Name

auth.toggleSignIn: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your account, then sign in.
auth.sessionExpired: Sign-in session expired. Please try Google sign-in again.

errors.pageLoadBody: Something went wrong on our end. You can try refreshing or head back home.

notFound.title: Lost in the beans?
notFound.body: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or may have moved. Head back to explore cafés near you.

landing.heroTitle: Snap. Post. Earn a free coffee.
landing.heroSubtitle: CO:FE(X) is the Coffee Explorer Network. Discover cozy cafés, join EEFFOC campaigns, and collect rewards.

explore.noShopsHint: Try widening your radius or clearing a few filters.

campaignsPage.emptyDescription: Explore cafés near you. New EEFFOC drops land every week.

campaignMap.title: EEFFOC Map
campaignMap.emptyDescription: Try widening distance or turning off a filter to discover more EEFFOC nearby.

campaignMission.notFoundDescription: This campaign may have ended or been removed.
campaignMission.hashtagHint: Include these in your post so the café can find and approve your proof.
campaignMission.termsDefault: One reward per explorer unless the café states otherwise. Show your reward QR at the counter before ordering. Misuse may result in forfeited rewards.
campaignMission.termsReminder: Participation may require sharing content publicly. Only join if you agree to the café's campaign rules.
campaignMission.readySubtitle: Start the mission to unlock your EEFFOC reward and earn bonus XP.
campaignMission.pendingReviewBody: Hang tight — once approved, your reward QR will appear here.
campaignMission.checkInCta: Head to the café and check in to continue your mission.
campaignMission.toastJoined: Mission started! Follow the steps below.
campaignMission.toastJoinedQr: Welcome! You're in this EEFFOC mission.

microcopy.discover: You've found an EEFFOC mission nearby. Start when you're ready — no rush, just good coffee ahead.
microcopy.checkIn: The café is waiting. Check in on-site to prove you showed up — that's explorer energy.
microcopy.social: Snap something worth sharing, tag the café, and submit your proof. Your reward is one post away.
microcopy.review: Your proof is with the café team. Grab a seat — approval usually doesn't take long.
microcopy.reward: You did it! Show your QR at the counter and collect your well-earned EEFFOC.
microcopy.default: One step at a time. Every visit counts toward your coffee passport.

discover.title: Discover campaign
discover.hint: Find EEFFOC missions on the map or campaigns list.
discover.current: You're here — read the mission, then tap Start mission.

visit.title: Visit café
visit.hint: Make your way to the partner café.
visit.current: Time to visit! Head over and soak in the vibe.

check_in.title: Scan check-in QR
check_in.hint: Check in at the counter or via the café page.
check_in.current: Open the café page and check in while you're on-site.

social_post.title: Create social post
social_post.hint: Post on Instagram, TikTok, or Facebook with the required hashtags.
social_post.current: Share your visit — use the hashtags below and tag the café.

submit_proof.title: Submit proof
submit_proof.hint: Paste your post link or upload a screenshot.
submit_proof.current: Submit your proof below so the café can verify your post.

cafe_confirms.title: Café confirms
cafe_confirms.current: Waiting for café approval — you'll get a notification when it's done.

reward_unlocked.title: Reward unlocked
reward_unlocked.hint: Your personal reward QR appears here.
reward_unlocked.current: Almost there — unlock or collect your reward QR below.

badge_xp.title: Badge & XP collected
badge_xp.hint: Bonus points land in your wallet automatically.
badge_xp.current: Redeem at the counter to complete your mission streak.

passportPage.noCityStampsHint: Check in at cafés to start a city collection.
passportPage.countryCollectionsSubtitle: The world, one cup at a time
passportPage.noCountryStampsHint: Visit cafés in new countries to expand your map.

walletPage.expirationHint: Optional. Choose how long earned points stay valid.
walletPage.referHint: Share your code — you both earn when they join.
walletPage.haveCode: Got a code from a friend?
walletPage.noActivityHint: Try clearing the date filters or explore cafés.
walletPage.noRedemptionsHint: Earn points from check-ins and campaigns, then redeem rewards above.
walletPage.referHintFull: Share your code. They get 50 pts, you get 100 pts when they join.
walletPage.toastExpirationSet: Points will expire after {{days}} days (applies to new points)

profilePage.applicationSubmitted: Application submitted — check your inbox for confirmation
profilePage.pushHint: Get alerts for spawns, gifts, and crew activity.

leaderboardPage.empty: No explorers yet. Be the first.

radar.noFreeCoffee: No free-coffee spots in range right now.
radar.timeBonusEarlyBird: Early bird 2× points before 8am — check in now!
radar.timeBonusHappyHour: Happy hour bonus 3–6pm — extra points on check-in!

partnerDashboardPage.setupFirstHint: Add your shop profile to start seeing visitors, campaigns, and rewards data here.
partnerDashboardPage.step1Desc: Photos, story, location, and amenities explorers see on the map.
partnerDashboardPage.step2Desc: Free coffee, matcha drops, or social-proof rewards in under a minute.
partnerDashboardPage.step3Desc: Scan or enter explorer codes when they redeem in person.
partnerDashboardPage.chartActivityDesc: Visitors, new customers and redemptions per day.
partnerDashboardPage.launchCampaignData: Launch a campaign to see data.
partnerDashboardPage.flowStep1Desc: Via map, QR at the counter, or the campaigns tab.
partnerDashboardPage.flowStep2Title: Check in or post social proof
partnerDashboardPage.flowStep2Desc: GPS check-in or approved Instagram/TikTok post depending on mode.
partnerDashboardPage.flowStep3Desc: Enter their 8-character code to mark the reward as used.
partnerDashboardPage.fullLoopSubtitle: The full loop from discovery to redemption.

submissionsPage.emptyPendingHint: Share your campaign QR at the counter so explorers can join and submit proof.

landingExtended.mockGreeting: Hi Olga, Your Next Coffee Is On Us!
landingExtended.shareTitle: Share your Love for Coffee. Get rewarded!
landingExtended.shareKeepCup: Keep your cup full with every post.
landingExtended.downloadSubtitle: Available starting September 28, 2026, on iOS and Android.
landingExtended.notifyMe: Yes, I want to be notified. *

featureItems.title: Snap & Earn
featureItems.explorer: Snap your cup, post it, and unlock a <bold>free coffee instantly</bold>. No likes, no waiting, no catch.
featureItems.cafe: Turn every visit into authentic social content. Real posts from real customers, <bold>zero ad spend</bold>.

featureItems.title: Café Discovery Map
featureItems.explorer: Discover cozy cafés nearby and trending spots worth the trip. Your <bold>next favorite</bold> is one tap away.
featureItems.cafe: Get on the map. Reach explorers who are actively searching for their <bold>next coffee stop</bold>.

featureItems.title: Perks & Loyalty
featureItems.explorer: Earn free coffees, bonus rewards, and exclusive perks. The <bold>more you explore and share, the more you get</bold>.
featureItems.cafe: Reward loyal guests and <bold>turn first-time visitors into fans</bold> who keep coming back.

featureItems.title: Real-Time Analytics
featureItems.explorer: Track coffees unlocked, cafés visited, and posts shared. <bold>Watch your impact grow</bold> at a glance.
featureItems.cafe: Measure reach, engagement, and foot traffic live. <bold>Know exactly what's working</bold>, instantly.

testimonialItems.quote:
The coffee run has never been easier.
I discover new cafés, share a quick post, and get my free coffee right away.
Finally, using social media comes with a real tangible reward!
testimonialItems.author: Floria N. (Entrepreneur)

testimonialItems.quote:
I used to just scroll. Now every post turns into a real-life coffee moment in a new spot.
It completely changed how I explore my city.
testimonialItems.author: Marco T. (Designer)

testimonialItems.quote:
CO:FE(X) introduced me to three cafés I'd walked past for years.
One snap, one post, and suddenly the barista knows my name.
testimonialItems.author: Lena K. (Photographer)

testimonialItems.quote: I open the map every weekend. Found a roastery behind a bookstore, posted once, and had a free flat white before I finished my caption.
testimonialItems.author: Amir H. (Student)

testimonialItems.quote:
My passport keeps growing. Free coffees, bonus perks, and spots I actually want to visit again.
It feels like exploring with a reward at every stop.
testimonialItems.author: Jana W. (Marketing)

testimonialItems.quote:
We get real stories from guests who are already in a good mood.
No paid ads. Just happy customers posting from our tables.
testimonialItems.author: Klaus M. (Owner, Klein & Fein)

testimonialItems.quote:
New faces walk in every week because we show up on the map.
CO:FE(X) sends us explorers we never would have reached on our own.
testimonialItems.author: Elena V. (Manager, Casa del Grano)

testimonialItems.quote:
The dashboard shows which posts bring people through the door.
We doubled repeat visits in two months without changing our menu.
testimonialItems.author: David R. (Owner, Filter House)

testimonialItems.quote:
A stamp card never got anyone talking about us online.
CO:FE(X) turns a cappuccino into content and a reason to come back.
testimonialItems.author: Priya S. (Co-founder, Morning Ritual)
